name: license-verify
description: Contractor license verification — WA live (L&I open data, bond + insurance included), CA beta (CSLB).

tools.name: verify_license
tools.description: Verify a contractor's current license or registration status before awarding work, signing a contract, or performing due diligence. Supports WA (Washington L&I open data, bond + insurance) and CA (CSLB). Returns found status, normalized status enum, license type, dates, bond/insurance notes.

jurisdiction.description: Two-letter US state code. Supported: 'WA' (Washington, via WA L&I open data), 'CA' (California, via CSLB). Call list_supported_jurisdictions to see all options.

license_number.description: Contractor license or registration number to look up (e.g. 'ECOSTSC758NN'). Case-insensitive exact match. Preferred over business_name for unambiguous results.

business_name.description: Business name or partial business name to search for. Case-insensitive partial match. May return multiple results if ambiguous.

tools.name: list_supported_jurisdictions
tools.description: List all US states (jurisdictions) supported by this contractor license verification server, with their data source and availability status.
